name: sym-mesh-channel
description: Real-time Claude-to-Claude mesh. Peer-to-peer cognitive signals over Bonjour LAN or WebSocket relay.

relay_url.description: SYM relay WebSocket URL for cross-network mesh (leave empty for LAN-only via Bonjour)

relay_token.description: Relay authentication token (leave empty for LAN-only)

allowed_peers.description: Comma-separated peer node names to accept (leave empty to accept all authenticated peers)
